name: roach-survivor
description: Roach Survivor roguelite game built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Electron.
author: Moeary

scripts.electron:dist: npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never --win nsis --x64
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never --linux AppImage --x64
